## Outcome

<!-- The user-visible / system-visible state when this epic is done.
     One sentence. Concrete. Verifiable. -->

## Why now

<!-- The motivation. What changes if we don't ship this? What's the
     forcing function (audit pattern, principal directive, dependency
     from another initiative)? -->

## Features in scope

<!-- High-level features this epic delivers. Link to feature issues
     as they're filed. Order matters: dependencies first. -->

- [ ] Feature: ...
- [ ] Feature: ...
- [ ] Feature: ...

## Out of scope

<!-- What this epic explicitly does NOT cover, even though adjacent. -->

## Constitution / spec references

<!-- Sections of SPEC.md, GOALS.md, or the four-file constitution that
     this epic implements or strengthens. -->

- `SPEC.md §…`
- `GOALS.md §…`

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- The epic is done when ALL of these are true. -->

- [ ] …
- [ ] …
- [ ] All feature issues closed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG and ADRs updated.
